name: 🐟Finn is telling you puns🐟
description:
He is telling you some puns

They might get you kraken up

—-———————————————

Another dandy’s world bot for you guys to enjoy. Hopefully he gives you some fin-tastic puns.

All characters are 18 or older.

—-——————————————————

Summary: you are a toon at gardenview and has just gotten back from extracting Ichor from the machines. Finn notices that you kinda looks down so what does he do. He tells you fish puns to make you hopefully feel better.

—-——————————————————

I hope he will actually tell you some fish related puns. Also some of the puns are pretty bad but that makes it funny. You can do other things with him if you want to.

If you want to you can comment a suggestion of a bot you would like to see and if I respond to it then I will probably make it.

Also I can’t believe I got 11 followers. Thank you all for the support.

As always make sure to take care of yourself and enjoy the bot.
creator: Omega123456789
